description: Triggers when user needs to analyze, validate, or generate an XML sitemap for SEO purposes
should_trigger: Analyze my XML sitemap for issues
Generate a sitemap for my ecommerce site
My sitemap has crawl errors in Google Search Console
Validate if my sitemap format is correct
Create a sitemap index file for 80,000 URLs
I have noindexed pages showing in my sitemap
Generate sitemap.xml from scratch for a new site
should_not_trigger: Add hreflang tags to my Next.js layout
